title: Minimega
description: Legacy Console Edition (LCE) Minigames ported to Java Edition! (Glide as of 2026)
body:
## Minimega
**Minimega** is a mod that aims to recreate the minigames from the discontinued Legacy Console Editions.

| Id | Minigame | Status |
| --- | ---- | ---- |
| 99 | Lobby | Playable* |
| 1 | Battle | Playable* |
| 2 | Tumble | Work in Progress |
| 3 | Glide | Playable* |
| 70 | Fistfight*** | Playable |

*Certain features are not 1-to-1, Lobby is missing all entities.

***Fistfight accepts community submissions.

## Mod Compatibility
Minimega is generally compatible with other mods, including [Iris](https://modrinth.com/mod/iris) and [Legacy4J](https://modrinth.com/mod/legacy4j) 1.9-pre-2 **ONLY**

## How to use
Open the Multiplayer screen and click the `Mini Games` button. If you have Legacy4J you can access the Mini Games panel directly in the Title Screen.

## Multiplayer
Minimega supports multiplayer with up to 16* players! Just check the Online Game and Public Game tickboxes when creating a match, and invite your friends!

<sup><sub>*8 players and 4 players for weaker PCs.</sub></sup>

## Alternatives
Consider checking out [Legacy Edition Minigames](https://www.legacyminigames.net/), a project that aims to port the LCE minigames to Java Edition _while remaining compatible with vanilla clients_.

## Showcase
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/CoH4lclZOjs" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

Want to showcase your gameplay here? Make a post in #showcase in Minimega's [Discord server](https://discord.gg/graZMxtsdW).
